title: Analytics - Support Device Opened
scenario: Analytics event logged when Support > Device screen is opened in the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
Tap on the Support option from the Home screen or menu.
Tap on the Device screen under the Support section.
expected: An analytics event is logged when the Support > Device screen is opened. The event should include usage analytics data such as event count by country, gender, app version, app build, and app environment.
